creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
Your compact notes do not help me understand the case.

Before the change:
The program works with cua* serial ports (as documented at FreeBSD web site and 
the program itself). The program does not work with tty* devices.
Where is a POLA violation (you try to fix)?

After the change:
The program works only with tty* devices but they may work as cua* devices. So, external devices (ex. Arduino boards) need to use tty* devices?
AFAIC, *this* is POLA violation. As well as FreeBSD documentation.

So far you you are very active at answers but, sorry, too terse. Please, answer my questions:
. Where is the POLA violation you try to fix?
. Why restrict using cua*?
, Why allow using only tty*, which may act like cua*?

Thank you for help and patience.
